@graph.description: Chlorella is best framed as a conservative research profile with mechanistic evidence and a focus on Metabolic Health; Liver Support. Current workbook signals support mechanistic context around Oxidative Stress Modulation; Metabolic Regulation; Lipid Metabolism Support, not treatment claims.
